textByHash.53cb01287404b844a6f4ffdf9314136873c7e025: It is good to see you again! The Dorgeshuun Council would like to ask a favour of you, if you are interested?
textByHash.ff672d78795987901c0421540e36dbed67d84502: Surface-dwellers have been visiting the mines for some time now, but no Dorgeshuun has yet visited the surface.
textByHash.6acb669a4a1ffd17cdd7781a76c54df00fe43f8d: We are curious about the surface, and we are also worried about the dangers it poses. We know that Lumbridge is friendly but we are worried that the HAM group may be plotting against us.
textByHash.5149fcae6237b2c139c5c33b181189e0dfc52ceb: We are planning to send an agent to the surface and we would like you to act as a guide.
textByHash.91334c01ba85af798cfa53c22e7ceff075c3e56c: In order to get into the HAM base undetected you will both need to go in disguise. You should get two full sets of HAM robes. Once you have them, our agent will meet you in the cellar of Lumbridge castle.
textByHash.5f5f9e6ae5899a37bcaa8747ada5966867f600bd: Oh dear! Our agent is ready, but the Council will not let an expedition go ahead without a guide. If you reconsider, please let me know!
textByHash.db16c2db04698fdb39a834dc1044634165b9c91f: Hello Zanik, hello . How is your exploration of the surface going?
textByHash.1809948a612b0c317261cb4e781140207c76a2bc: I'm sorry, but surface goblins are not allowed into the city.
textByHash.5f8a6ac1a63f5db5259a4b9a85fb8f2dc6dc1e72: Our laws don't currently allow surface goblins to enter. The council wants to extend a hand of friendship to their kind, but we have heard that they are a very warlike people.
textByHash.7741bf09377f6183eee855f5e707a09fa1789737: Hmm... If you are prepared to vouch for him, then I suppose we can trust him.
textByHash.1fcd8b9b95a40cf00225686003242b8fd9363307: Very well, Grubfoot. You may enter Dorgesh-Kaan, but you must stay with until you leave.
textByHash.44c45833e6c285b9821c4981c0ab11b951c28605: Who...who are you? How did you get in here?
textByHash.fc57f584082c6e2bd707a4ac9c5f462310560b4b: Help! A surface-dweller this deep in our mines? We will all be destroyed!
textByHash.dac1f4d74beeb0b225ba30e88e6e09de93270aa3: Perhaps you are friend after all!
textByHash.3073df8fcef7e75ce604cc879e5a32eb8f762580: Greetings, friend. I am sorry I panicked when I saw you.
textByHash.900a6936e957d9c91eb86fefa485f5ed9f7a6965: Our legends tell of the surface as a place of horror and violence, where the gods forced us to fight in terrible battles.
textByHash.8066f7e652079f7329a468177708f237105cbcd2: When I saw a surface-dweller appear I was afraid it was a return to the old days!
textByHash.8ddcbc0cd28ea929ee15da0ebfbd3d7957ad9353: It was an accident. We were following a seam of iron and suddenly we found ourselves in a room!
textByHash.73cdb197f10899bfddbbaf7defe3b9a7852a14ad: We blocked up our tunnel behind us and ran back here. Then we did what cave goblins always do when there is a problem: we hid and hoped it would go away.
textByHash.5dab37e1e1ad0d5194955c5f88b725862c768382: We meant no harm! Please tell the ruler of the above- people that we want to make peace.
textByHash.3b956cff47efd9a60275b7dd4b1b1ffaabcff9cb: No offence, but we will not let you mine here until there is peace between the humans and the Dorgeshuun.
textByHash.3b4bc774260ac94a4aa139f093768041740fe2e0: Certainly. Please hurry, you must avert the war!
textByHash.af33645d1a308d201b784c98f2fd7348908c06e8: We have more important things to think about than a brooch right now. We must prevent a war!
textByHash.23cb048a84766e06da589d13299aa7715018f10d: Oh no! We would never do such a thing!
textByHash.647e004678848f80ab8aff63a7a8f39925be008d: I assure you we took nothing from the cellar. You must convince the Duke we are innocent!
textByHash.77562ab56a34bb6b5dfee5143ed3055a99a6b733: Why would we want to steal silver? As you see we have much silver already in our mines!
textByHash.f34eeab72ddf690bb8ba9aa396624863e91482df: The last thing we want is war! If we had anything of yours, we would return it at once. But we don't!
textByHash.d8d40372ff9aebd18d2a865b42f5c6492b5b8445: A peace treaty? Then you will not invade?
textByHash.53c64f2cb79cdac1608f7f86ff10f363c55491a5: I will summon Ur-tag, our headman, at once.
textByHash.81465cfa1514ed173794b0e8a4964737cf905517: Certainly. I will buy any iron or silver ore you mine. Speak to me again when you have some.
textByHash.3cf0d970357d2da9649fdd415ffd364e07e06091: I will give you gold pieces for the ore you are carrying.
textByHash.3d1a6a9c9d5d4a827492e72ab970639dce67510a: Our ancient legends say that goblins were created by an evil god in order to fight in a huge war. This god sent the Dorgeshuun tribe to fight a battle where all would die.
textByHash.42ad4d0e838246a8441965f5d3274efa7f227f07: But our ancestors escaped by hiding in a deep hole in the ground where our god could not find us. Eventually an earthquake sealed the hole and they were forever safe.
textByHash.fcf459097675aaba24b4fb458da48af33c754132: Even if the gods are no longer at war, I find it hard to believe that a tribe of peaceful goblins would be safe above. I have heard of humans coming down into the caves to slaughter our people!
textByHash.c890b908d99f314cdd31df2a0ef023f351de7780: But even if we could return, we would not want to. We are adapted to living underground, and we have built a home for ourselves that we do not want to leave.
textByHash.98e2ed4e5fc068ef823f1aa79fd8b4f82fe2e35e: Our ancestors did not speak his name, thinking that to do so would attract his attention. His name has been unspoken for so long that it is now entirely forgotten.
textByHash.6307aa75d2b9f1804684b49450a2f891b5451ea7: That is for the best. We have survived perfectly well without gods, and we do not want a return to the old ways.
textByHash.5c8c92a35b13fe499cc8ea4bb02b4342d6b4ccb2: I lost it in a mining accident a few years ago.
textByHash.9cd8321cb98d655bece0636420fa1ac8c5e70cef: This area is very unstable. That's why we put markers on the wall showing the safest path.
textByHash.1211f4d09b8af9d86651cfc868d938f8434a589b: Yes! I thought I'd lost it. Thank you.
textByHash.9a88452a8c74a3aa84a35bef4d454778fa052eb4: Have one of these helmets. It will be useful if you want to work in the mine.
